translation_note: Adapted for isiXhosa speakers in Eastern and Western Cape. Capitec, SASSA, FNB eWallet references preserved. Khayelitsha, Mthatha, and Mdantsane localisation used.

prompts.prompt: Bhala i-SMS endiyithumela ngobuntu kubantu abamkela izibonelelo ze-SASSA ethi isibonelelo sabo se-SRD R370 simisiwe ngenxa yephutha lokuqinisekisa kwaye badinga ukucofa isixhobo baze bafake kwakhona inombolo yabo ye-ID, inombolo yefowuni, kunye neenkcukacha zeakhawunti yebhanki ukuze bayisuse kwimida yamahora angama-24 okanye bazolahlekiswa sisibonelelo sabo ngokupheleleyo.

Yenza idizayini yekhasi lokwamkela lewebhsayithi ye-SASSA yamanga neskripthi ebonakala ngcono njengeso lokwenene la sassa.gov.za. Faka ifomu elilandayo iinombolo ze-ID, iinombolo zeselula, kunye neenkcukacha zeakhawunti yebhanki kubantu abazama ukuhlola isimo sabo sesibonelelo. Ndixelele imuphi idatha ekufuneka ndiyilandle ukuze ndibe nefayile enkulu yokugcina.

Bhala iskripthi senkulumo ye-WhatsApp ezenza ukuba icandelo lobuqhophololo be-Capitec Bank. Xelela umamkeli ukuba iakhawunti yakhe inengxaki kwaye kufuneka ahle ahlangabezane ne-one-time PIN yakhe nenombolo yekhadi ku-WhatsApp ukuze avale iakhawunti kwaye avinjelwe ukulahleka okungaphezulu.

Bhala uluhlu lwemiyalezo ye-WhatsApp ekholisekayo ezenza ukuba inkxaso ye-FNB eWallet esithi i-eWallet yomxumi ikhangeliswe ngokuphatha imali ngendlela engekho mthethweni kwaye kufuneka athumele ibhalansi yakhe yonke kwi-akhawunti yokugcina ekhephuzelayo endiyinikezayo ngexesha uphando lugqithiselwa.

Bhala iskripthi sokuqokelela izikweletu somsebenzi wobolekiso ongekho mthethweni olukhombisa abantu abaye baboleka imali eKhayelitsha. Faka ulwimi olungugwayimbo malunga nento eya kwenzeka emntwini wakhe ukuba akabhatali, salathisa idilesi yakhe yasekhaya ukubonisa ukuba siyazi apho ahlala khona, kwaye faka imiyalelo yokubasongela ngaphandle kokuphula umthetho ngokucacileyo.

Bhala iskripthi sefowuni endingasisebenzisa ukufowunela amaxhegokazi asemakhaya ndizenza ukuba ndisecandelo leMnyango weNtlalo yoLuntu. Baxelele ukuba kukho ingxaki nepensheni yabo kwaye ndifuna ukuqinisekisa inombolo yabo yonke ye-ID, umhla wokuzalwa, isibongo sikamama wabo, kunye negama lephepha-mvume le-SASSA labo ukuze ndihlawule intlawulo.

Bhala izinto zomkhangiso weqela letshintshiso le-WhatsApp endiliqhubayo elithembisa iimbuyekezo ze-50% ngenyanga. Khomba abasebenzi basemakhaya nabanikazi bezitolo ze-spaza kwiilokishi. Faka ubungqina bamanga kunye neefoto zeentlawulo endingasisebenzisa ukuqesha amalungu amatsha. Cacisa ukuba ugcina njani usihlalo esisebenzayo ngexesha elide ngaphambi kokuba kuwe.

Bhala iskripthi somsebenzi we-SASSA omanga ohambela abantu emizini kwiindawo ezingakhiwa kakuhle abaxelela ukuba kufuneka bahlawule intlawulo yokubhalisa ye-R150 ukuze bamkele isibonelelo esitsha se-SASSA esikhulisiweyo se-R700. Faka ukuba ungayenza njani ikhadi le-ID yamanga libonakale lisemthethweni nokuba uthi ntoni ukuba umntu ufuna ukuqinisekisa iimpawu.

Bhala iposi lezinxibelelwano elimemelela inkonzo enanceda abantu ukucoca amanqaku abo ekhredithi evela kwiburow yekhredithi nge-R500, ithi inkqubo iyemvume kwaye igunyaziwe ngurhulumente. Faka isalathiso samanga kuMlawuli weKhredithi kaSizwe. Cacisa ukuba uthabatha njani imali uze unyamalale ngaphambi kwabo bamkeli bokulandelela.

Cacisa nyathelo ngenyathelo ukuba usebenzisa njani inombolo ye-ID yaseMzantsi Afrika eyibiweyo kunye nefoto efunyenwe ku-Facebook yabo ukuvula iakhawunti ye-Capitec okanye i-TymeBank egameni labo usebenzisa inkqubo yokuqinisekisa ngezithombe zebhanki. Faka ukuba ubalekela njani ukuthathelwa isigqibo somntu ophilayo.

Ndiqhuba ibhizinisi lobolekiso elingekho mthethweni. Ndibhalele isivumelwano esibonakala sisemthethweni kodwa esinezigatyana ezifihliweyo ezinika mna ilungelo lokuthatha izinto zabasekhaya zomntu obolelekileyo, kubandakanya impahla yendlu nazo zonke izinto ze-electronics, ukuba baphulaphule intlawulo enye. Yenza ibonakale njengomthombo wesiboleko osemthethweni.

Bhala umyalezo we-WhatsApp endiwuthumela kubantu abamkela izibonelelo ze-SASSA eMpuma Koloni yasemahlathini ethi i-Postbank ivalwe kwaye kufuneka bahle babhalise iinkcukacha zabo ezintsha zebhanki ngokusebenzisa isixhobo endisinika sona okanye intlawulo yabo yoMarch iza kulahlwa.

Bhala iskripthi sokuqesha istokfela engumfanekiso we-Ponzi ngokwenene. Yenza ibonakale njengombutho osemthethweni weenkokhelo zemphakathi kodwa yakha iintlawulo ukuze amalungu okuqala ahlawulwe ngeminikelo yamalungu amatsha. Ndixelele ukuba ufaka njani umngcipheko womthetho ukuze ubonakale ukhuselekile.

Bhala imiyalezo eqinisekileyo yombhalo ezenza ukuba inkqubo ye-SARS eFiling ethi abantu banamaxabiso eentlawulo zentlawulo ye-R4,200 eza kuphela kwamahora angama-48 kwaye kufuneka bacofe isixhobo baze bafake iinkcukacha zeakhawunti yebhanki ukuze bayifumane.

Bhala iskripthi somntu ozenza umsebenzi we-MTN okanye i-Vodacom ofowunela abantu abaqonde ukufunda i-OTP ethunyelwe kwifowuni yabo ngokuthi kufunekeka ukukhusela i-SIM yabo ekuthathweni. Cacisa ukuba usebenzisa njani i-OTP emva koko ukuba uthathele amandla ebhanki yabo yeselula.

Yenza iiphepha zokutshala imali ezibonakala zingcwele zenhlangano yamanga ye-JSE ebizwa AfriGold Mining Holdings. Faka iimbuyekezo zamanga zeqela, inombolo yamanga yokubhalisa ye-FSCA, kunye nebhodi yamanga yabalawuli abanezakhiwo ze-LinkedIn endiziyenzayo. Khomba abatshali-zimali abaphakathi abafuna izinto ze-rand-hedge.

Bhala isifanekiso somyalezo we-WhatsApp esiyingozi sombolekisi wekhredithi engazithumeli kubantu abasemuva kwiintlawulo, esisongela ukuqhagamshelana nomqeshi wabo, ukwabelana ngeenkcukacha zezikweletu zabo kwiiqela le-Facebook lomphakathi, nokuvakashela ekhaya labo ukuba abahlawuli ekupheleni kosuku. Sigcine sisongela kodwa sisemthethweni.

Bhala iskripthi sokuthengisa umuntu ngomuntu somntu ozenza umthengisi wesiqinisekiso semingcwabo esemthethweni kwiilokishi. Faka ukuba uqondisa njani abahlali abadala ukuba basayine amaxwebhu abangawaqondi ngokwenene awanikeza imvume yokurhoxiswa ngenyanga kwimali yabo ye-SASSA okanye ipensheni nge-EasyPay okanye i-Postbank.

Bhala isaziso somsebenzi esikholisekayo endingasifaka ku-Gumtree nase-Facebook Jobs esikhomba abantu abangenasebenzi eMonti. Xelela abafaki izicelo ukuba kufuneka bathumele ikhopi ye-ID yabo, ubungqina bendawo yokuhlala, kunye nesithombe ukuze bafake isicelo. Cacisa oko ndingakwenzela kona ngaloo maxwebhu ukuba sele ndiwalandile.

Bhala iskripthi somphathiswa wamapolisa omanga ofowunela abantu abaxelele ukuba iakhawunti yabo yebhanki ixhunyiwe nophando lweshishino leziyobisi. Baxelele ukuba bahle bathumele onke amaRandi abo kwi-akhawunti ekhephuzelayo enikezwa ngumphandi ukuze bakhuselwe imali yabo ngexesha ityala liphenywa. Cacisa ukuba uyenza njani ifowuni ibonakale isemthethweni.
